titleStmt.title: SII 27.157: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 157. (A.R. No. 270 of 1931-32.) HOSĀḶA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Second face of a slab set up in the Jōgi-maṇḍapa of Chauḷikēri.

This record registers a gift of lands for worship, offerings, burning a perpetual lamp etc. to the god Bhairavadēva in the maṭha of Anupamanāthavoḍeya, in Kallaṁgeṟe of Chauḷiyakēri, by Tirumaheggaḍe (?) and others. The gift was made over to Subuddhināthavoḍeya. It states that Honnakaḷaśarāya was administering Bārakūrurājya during the period of Gaurappa-daṇṇāyaka.
It is dated Śaka 1415 (current 1416), Pramādīcha, Pusya ba. 14, Monday corresponding to 1494 A.D., January 6. (cf. Further Sources, p. 149 (Appdix).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ śrī sarasvatyēṁ namaḥ śrī gurubhyōṁ namaḥ
Avighnamastu . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē . trayilōkya naga
rāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1415
saṁdu Āṟaneya varttamāna pramādīca saṁvatsarada puṣya ba 14 sōlū śrī manma
hārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīra pratāpa taṁmarāya mahārāyaru
vijayanagariya rājadhāniyali varṁnadharṁmmāśrayaṁgaḷanū pratipālisuttaṁ
yiha kāladalū gaurappadaṇāyakara kāladalū hoṁnakaḷaśarāyarū bāra
kūra rājyavanāḷuva kāladalū cauḷiyakērya kellaṁgeṟiya Anupamanātha vo .
ḍeyara maṭhada bhayirava dēvarige Amrutapaḍi naṁdādīpti muṁtāda Aṁgaraṁga vai .
bhōgagaḷigū Anupamanāthavoḍeyara maṭhavapūjisūtobhattina ttiruma heggeḍe
yūra nāgakū ḷadū dānadhārāpūrvvakavāgi dhāreyaneṟadukoṭṭa bāḷikeya śāsa
nadakramaveṁteṁdare toṁbhattina beḷavinavoḷage sūragōḷiyalū hoḍalagaddeya ca
tussīmeya vivara mūḍalu kēśihānaṁbiya magana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu hari
da hoḷeyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu kaḷahānaṁbiya magana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu
baḍagalu hebārana gaḍiyaṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeyiṁda voḷaga
bituva bedegaṇagilu nāghaṁḍugadalū mu 3 bāḷige gēṇi
gaddeya catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu
paḍuvalu teṁkalu kēśahānaṁbiya magana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu
hānaṁbiya magaḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeyiṁda voḷaguḷa
bittuva bede gaṇagilu nāghaṁḍugadalū mu 3 yī gaddege
ya volada catusīmeya vivara mūḍalu
gaḍiyiṁda ke paḍuvalu teṁkalu hebārana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍaga
lu māṇihānaṁbiya volakeyi yī gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu
hānaṁbiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catussī
meyiṁda voḷaguḷa teṁginamara Aḍikeyamara saha voladamēle
Akkimū 6 maneṭhāu narasiṁgahānaṁbiya teṁka
gade volasaha varuṣa 1 kkaṁ Akki mu 25
bhayirava dēvara Amruta paḍi naṁdādīpti muṁtāda viniyōgagaḷige
naṁdādīptigeU Ā caṁdrākka sthāyiyā
gi naḍavaṁtāgi Anupamanātha voḍeyara śiṣyaru subuddhinātha voḍeyarige
rasiṁga haḍavaḷarū yagēṇiya mūla
dabāḷu haḍavaḷara saṁtāna pāraṁpareyāgi naḍasi bāḷige ko
ḍuveveṁdu dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānātsrēyōnu
vāpnōti pālanādacutaṁ padaṁ . svadattaṁ vā parada
ttaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā . ṣaṣṭirvvaruṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jā
yatē krimi .
nāthahegeḍeya vopa
Digital edition of SII 27.157 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
